title: Singing and Dancing Snowman Plush Toy,Musical Santa Snowman Doll with 6 Christmas Songs for Christmas Animated Stuffed Decoration
features: Adorable Animated Christmas Plush:The dancing christmas snowman toy will sing six classic Christmas songs,"Decorate the Halls","Jingle Bells","Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer","Santa Claus Is Coming to Town" and "We Wish You a Merry Christmas". Click the switch again to switch to the next song and the xmas snowman body will sway with the music!The christmas singing stuffed animals snowman will make your Christmas more merry and bright with his funny and lively performance.

Musical Christmas Decorations:The christmas musical snowman battery box is located inside his clothes on his back.For easy use,you only need to install 3*AA batteries(not included) to power the animated christmas plush toys and then press the button on the snowman's left armpit, and the musical snowman singing and dancing performance will begin.

Animated Christmas Toys:The toy snowman singing dancing is made of high-quality soft and fluffy plush material, which is soft and comfortable to touch, exquisite in appearance, gentle and safe for children, and will not cause any adverse effects on the skin. The dancing santa snowman is equipped with a red scarf, a black cowboy hat, a carrot-like nose, branch-like arms and a kind smiley face.Twerking snowman can swing his head and arms to the rhythm of the music. Whether as a children's toy or as a holiday gift for family and friends, the snowman toy is a great Christmas gift.

Animated Snowman Decorations:The singing santa claus snowman adds more atmosphere to Christmas and the snowman Christmas animated figures can be placed in the window, on the bedside table, on the fireplace, or on the office desktop as a Christmas decoration, bringing more surprises and joy to the children.talking snowman is a great Christmas home decoration for your family or office.christmas animated plush snowman can bring joy and laughter to anyone who sees him, and his musical talent and charm will surely impress your guests.

Snowman Plush:The musical Christmas snowman comes with a beautiful gift box, making your Christmas more interesting as a Christmas gift. The musical christmas toys snowman can bring a relaxed and cheerful atmosphere to any party and is welcomed by everyone. The singing and dancing christmas toys talking snowman is a great gift for children, grandchildren, friends and family.
